abilities.description: 'When you fashion a charm, envision it and name the specific person or creature it protects against. Then roll +wits. On a strong hit, the wearer gains +2 when opposing the designated target through a move. If they roll a 1 on their action die, the effect is lost. On a weak hit, as above, but the wearer gains +1 instead of +2.
As above, and you may instead fashion a charm which aids the wearer against all supernatural threats, such as mystic rituals or horrors.

The wearer may make the @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.f4dec946415d8e57]{Aid Your Ally} move by leveraging the artifact's properties. If they do, they take +1 momentum as the talisman lends strength and clarity to those who stand together.
